narrative:
Precinct St Clair Twp West (precinct in Columbiana County) has 644 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.9 percentage points.
